title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Union Bank of India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Union Bank of India! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Kochi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Union Bank of India:
Union Bank of India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Union Bank of India!
